name: Marcus Reed
title: Master Barber & Owner
bio: With over 15 years behind the chair, Marcus specializes in classic cuts, precision fades, and hot-towel straight razor shaves.
photoDescription: Confident Black man in his late 30s with a sharp short fade and a neatly lined beard, wearing a black barber apron over a white tee.

name: Diego Alvarez
title: Senior Barber
bio: Diego brings a modern flair to every cut, known for textured crops, designs, and color work that turn heads.
photoDescription: Latino man in his late 20s with a textured pompadour and faded sides, smiling, wearing a dark denim shirt with sleeves rolled up.

name: Tyler Brooks
title: Barber & Grooming Specialist
bio: Tyler is the go-to for beard grooming and kid-friendly cuts, with a calm chair-side manner that keeps everyone comfortable.
photoDescription: Young white man in his mid 20s with a medium-length quiff and a full groomed beard, wearing a flannel shirt and round glasses.
